prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated 2.0L Ford Cosworth YB (BD series) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a custom dry-sump system by Titan Motorsport, paired with a Jenvey ITB (Individual Throttle Body) setup and a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by Janspeed Engineering for optimized exhaust scavenging

Full chassis reinforcement with a TIG-welded multi-point roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, 8-point) and seam-welded chassis rails, combined with a polybush kit from SuperPro (front and rear) and spherical bearing conversion for the rear trailing arms to eliminate compliance under hard cornering

Bespoke suspension setup featuring Öhlins TTX25 coilovers with 400lb/in front and 350lb/in rear springs, custom valving for the T53’s unique weight distribution (48/52), and adjustable anti-roll bars by Whiteline (24mm front, 22mm rear) with rose-jointed drop links for zero deflection
estetica: Full carbon fiber body conversion using a bespoke kit by Fibre-Lyte (UK), including a one-piece front splitter with integrated dive planes, a rear diffuser with Gurney flap, and a removable hardtop with a NACA duct for engine bay cooling, all finished in raw 2x2 twill weave

Custom widebody conversion using hand-formed aluminum overfenders (front and rear) by Historic Racing Fabrications, extending track width by 50mm per side, paired with custom 15x8 and 15x9 ET0 wheels by Revolution Race Wheels (3-piece, magnesium centers) wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ tires (185/55 front, 225/50 rear)

Functional aero package including a rear wing by Aeroform Composites (dual-element, adjustable angle of attack) mounted on aluminum pedestals, and a custom radiator ducting system with carbon fiber inlet scoops (side-mounted) to feed the oil cooler and intercooler (if turbocharged)
